articles.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform - TechCrunch
articles.description: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.
articles.content: Poke, a startup that turns using AI agents into something as simple as sending a text message, has become the first AI agent approved to run on Apple’s Messages for Business platform. Previously, the… [+4702 chars]

articles.title: RTX Spark To Encourage Industry Towards Lighter Laptops With Less Bulky Cooling Solutions, As Surface Laptop Ultra Targets A 110W TDP - Wccftech
